description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic and has a uniform, light gray coloration, suggesting it is made of steel or a similar metal. The crossguard is angular and extends outward in a V-shape, providing hand protection and visual distinction. The handle is cylindrical, black, and appears to be wrapped or coated for grip, ending in a rounded pommel. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements. The proportions and construction suggest it is intended for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a metallic blade, angular crossguard, and a black cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel. The design is simple and functional, lacking ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, angular crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the handle, with the crossguard appearing as a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the handle, similar to view 1.
